category_sources: source_facts.description says CLI for steamguard; official GitHub README describes a command line utility for Steam Mobile Authenticator and Steam 2FA.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is steamguard-cli; official GitHub README heading is steamguard-cli.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README provides quickstart, features, installation, usage, and security-related warnings.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
